<blockquote>[[File:Bed finder talent.gif|thumb|458x458px|Sneak + Right-click to put your dog on your head]]While a Dog with this ability is on your head, your bed will have a yellow outline around it. 

To place the Dog on your head, '''<code>Sneak + Right click</code>''' on the Dog with a [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bone Bone] in your hand. (You can still do this without Bed Finder.)

The range is '''200 blocks per level''' but becomes '''infinite at level 5'''.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT.
* This talent is useful for marking home location.
* Be careful when carrying your dog through narrow areas! (Allow for 3 blocks high at least.)
